description.value: **Benefit:** Targets affected by a disruptive spell must make concentration checks when using spells or spell-like abilities (DC equals the save DC of the disruptive spell plus the level of the spell being cast) for 1 round. Targets that avoid the spellâs effects avoid this featâs effect as well. Level Increase: +1 (a disruptive spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spellâs actual level.)
